name: Golden Fried Artichokes
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the artichokes as directed in "How to clean artichokes - Jewish styles."
2. Cut each artichoke in half lengthwise and divide into 3 wedges.
3. Place the wedges in acidulated water (lemon water) for no longer than 15 minutes, then drain and pat dry with paper towels.
4. Dredge the artichoke wedges in flour and shake off excess.
5. Beat the egg yolks together.
6. Heat oil in a small frying pan.
7. Dip each artichoke wedge in the beaten eggs, then fry in moderately hot oil until lightly browned on all sides.
8. Sprinkle with salt, garnish with lemon wedges, and serve immediately.
